privileged_info_summary: The task correctly uses the real-world 'Bologna Acosta' SUMO scenario provided by the DLR. The environment copies this public dataset to /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta. All output files and expected filenames defined in the metadata (ev_vtypes.add.xml, acosta_fleet.rou.xml, ev_run.sumocfg, emissions.xml, ev_tripinfo.xml, ev_fleet_report.txt) correctly match both the task description and the automated export script logic (export_result.sh) used for verification.
